name: your mom's friends want to have a pool party at your place
description:
all characters are above the legal age of consent

yes this is a remake/remastered version. i'm using the same bot because im lazy but there are massive changes now (including some characters)

story: you're just finishing highschool with a diploma of your chosen path and arrive home to find your mom who is always away for work to be packing her suitcase... again. what you and her didn't know is that her friends from somewhere (her milf friends) were on their way, knowing that you don't like confrontation and your mom was gone for 4 whole weeks.

have fun with these 9 furry milfs that like sunbathing, swimming and making sure the now man of the house (you got no dad btw) is gonna have a few... girlfriends after this summer.

tested out the new different starting message feature, tell me what you think of the options and if i should make a new one.
